codeReview.summary: JSDoc comments were successfully added to all required frontend files. The implementation fully covers the feature description and expected behavior: auth-client.ts has 9 JSDoc blocks (Session interface, User interface, AuthClient class, and all 6 public methods), and AuthContext.tsx has 3 JSDoc blocks (AuthContextValue interface, AuthProvider component, and useAuth hook). All comments are accurate, helpful, and follow proper JSDoc syntax with appropriate @param, @returns, and @throws tags.

summary: Feature passed review. All validation contract assertions (VAL-CONST-022, VAL-CONST-023, VAL-CONST-029, VAL-CONST-030) are fulfilled. The JSDoc comments are comprehensive, accurate, and helpful. The worker followed the procedure correctly, and verification commands (tsc, biome, grep) all passed.
